Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IReasonerInputWriter

All Known Implementing Classes:
ProofStoreCollector.Bridge
public interface IReasonerInputWriter
Common protocol for serializing a reasoner input object. Serialization is done by registering strings, predicates and expressions with an instance of this interface. Each one is associated to a key chosen by the client.

This interface is intended to be implemented by clients.

Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    putExpressions(String key, Expression... expressions)
    Serializes the given expressions with the given key.
    void
    putPredicates(String key, Predicate... predicates)
    Serializes the given predicates with the given key.
    void
    putString(String key, String string)
    Serializes the given string with the given key.

    • putPredicates

      void putPredicates(String key, Predicate... predicates) throws SerializeException
      Serializes the given predicates with the given key.

      predicates - predicates to serialize

    • putString

      void putString(String key, String string) throws SerializeException
      Serializes the given string with the given key.
      Parameters:
      key - key to use
      string - predicates to serialize
      Throws:
